faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Quick answers for parents, students, and teachers.
faq.tip: Still have questions? Email us at support@seephysics.com

items.question: Is SeePhysics free?
items.answer: Yes. Free-tier users get access to select experiments every day. Pro ($4.99/mo) and Max plans unlock all 64 experiments with unlimited time.

items.question: What subjects and grade levels are covered?
items.answer: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Earth Science, and Math — from K-2 through AP level. Every experiment is aligned with NGSS, GCSE, or AP standards.

items.question: Do I need to install anything?
items.answer: No. SeePhysics runs in any modern browser on desktop, tablet, or phone. No downloads, plugins, or special hardware.

items.question: Is student data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. We are GDPR and COPPA compliant with age-gating, consent management, and the ability to export or delete personal data on request.

cta.title: Ready to Ace Your Next Exam?
cta.description: Free experiments available. No sign-up required.

faq.title: 常见问题
faq.description: 家长、学生和老师最关心的问题。
faq.tip: 还有其他问题？请联系 support@seephysics.com

items.question: SeePhysics 免费吗？
items.answer: 是的。免费用户每天可以体验精选实验。Pro（$4.99/月）和 Max 套餐解锁全部 64 个实验和无限使用时长。

items.question: 覆盖哪些学科和年级？
items.answer: 物理、化学、生物、地球科学和数学，从 K-2 到 AP 全覆盖。每个实验都对齐 NGSS、GCSE 或 AP 课程标准。

items.question: 需要安装什么吗？
items.answer: 不需要。SeePhysics 在任何现代浏览器中运行，支持电脑、平板和手机，无需下载或插件。

items.question: 学生数据安全吗？
items.answer: 绝对安全。我们符合 GDPR 和 COPPA 规范，内置年龄门控、同意管理，支持随时导出或删除个人数据。

cta.title: 准备好下次考试拿高分了吗？
cta.description: 免费实验开放中，无需注册。
